discovered_test_cases.name: plus
discovered_test_cases.sourceCode:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<program language="SOL26">
  <class name="Main" parent="Object">
    <method selector="run">
      <block arity="0">
        <assign order="1">
          <var name="_"/>
          <expr>
            <send selector="plus:">
              <expr><literal class="Integer" value="10"/></expr>
              <arg order="1">
                <expr><literal class="Integer" value="5"/></expr>
              </arg>
            </send>
          </expr>
        </assign>
      </block>
    </method>
  </class>
</program>

discovered_test_cases.name: test02
discovered_test_cases.description: Test vytvoreni objektu a volani existujici metody
discovered_test_cases.sourceCode:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<program language="SOL26">
  <class name="A" parent="Object">
    <method selector="foo">
      <block arity="0"/>
    </method>
  </class>
  <class name="Main" parent="Object">
    <method selector="run">
      <block arity="0">
        <assign order="1">
          <var name="o"/>
          <expr>
            <send selector="new">
              <expr><literal class="class" value="A"/></expr>
            </send>
          </expr>
        </assign>
        <assign order="2">
          <var name="_"/>
          <expr>
            <send selector="foo">
              <expr><var name="o"/></expr>
            </send>
          </expr>
        </assign>
      </block>
    </method>
  </class>
</program>

discovered_test_cases.name: test03
discovered_test_cases.sourceCode:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<program language="SOL26">
  <class name="A" parent="Object">
  </class>
  <class name="Main" parent="Object">
    <method selector="run">
      <block arity="0">
        <assign order="1">
          <var name="o"/>
          <expr><send selector="new"><expr><literal class="class" value="A"/></expr></send></expr>
        </assign>
        <assign order="2">
          <var name="_"/>
          <expr>
            <send selector="bad">
              <expr><var name="o"/></expr>
            </send>
          </expr>
        </assign>
      </block>
    </method>
  </class>
</program>

discovered_test_cases.name: test04
discovered_test_cases.sourceCode:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<program language="SOL26">
  <class name="Main" parent="Object">
    <method selector="run">
      <block arity="0">
        <assign order="1">
          <var name="val"/>
          <expr><literal class="Integer" value="123"/></expr>
        </assign>
        <assign order="2">
          <var name="_"/>
          <expr>
            <send selector="print">
              <expr><var name="val"/></expr>
            </send>
          </expr>
        </assign>
      </block>
    </method>
  </class>
</program>
